segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a gothic-style classroom or common room illuminated by warm wall sconces. Three stone archways dominate the far wall, while wooden tables and benches fill the foreground. A group of NPCs sits silhouetted around a central round table, with no movement or changes occurring throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static perspective of a dimly lit gothic classroom that remains frozen in a state of quiet stillness. It begins with a view of a common room illuminated by the warm glow of wall sconces, highlighting the heavy textures of the environment. The gaze settles on three prominent stone archways dominating the far wall, while wooden tables and benches anchor the foreground. This composition holds steady as the camera captures a group of silhouetted figures seated around a central round table, with no movement or shifts in lighting occurring before the shot concludes.
